textByHashes.9b48976ddee51dc69f558583929e0ace980d59bb: You look like a new 'recruit'. How long have you been here?
textByHashes.278d9b093c62948fb30e69bef307acb19b529fe5: Yeah, it looks like it as well. It's a shame that I won't be around long enough to get to know you. I'm making a break for it today. I have a plan to get out of here! It's amazing in its sophistication.
textByHashes.461cb177ed4416b42bc404f62c456aea274e4a6e: They lead to an underground mine, but you really don't want to go down there.
textByHashes.a0dd0764872cd54fff6ef0922ec4db3a995dd98b: I've only seen slaves and guards go down there, I never see the slaves come back up. At least up here you have a nice view and a bit of sun. -- The slave smiles at you and goes back to his work. --
textByHashes.419dd756a5b7a84256b240f1ac51449f8b7616b4: Yes, it is actually. I have all the details figured out except for one.
textByHashes.8ee93f78676b61228f272797cd8148eefddab60d: -- The slave rattles the chains on his arms loudly. -- These bracelets, I can't seem to get them off. If I could get them off, I'd be able to climb my way out of here.
textByHashes.a75d20686cecf8c6ea5c16f1e06cae3d5c699bf2: Really, that would be great... -- The slave looks at you strangely. -- Hang on a minute... I suppose you want something for doing this?
textByHashes.a59dc17575b0cc3c032ac51bdc4acd0edf61438e: The last time I did a trade in this place, I nearly lost the shirt from my back!
textByHashes.70c531ff4c3ee57b4f91dd031ff628ede0991331: -- The slave looks at you blankly. --
textByHashes.ee1a06bec243d96b208a23d21f004f4bd2bf893b: You're either incredibly brave or incredibly stupid. But what would I wear if you take my clothes? Get me some nice desert clothes and I'll think about it?
textByHashes.f71eafa07e8cd76a96ec195a380e278046ba6abb: Yeah, bunch of no hopers, tried to rob me blind. But I guess that's what you get when you deal with convicts.
textByHashes.58432ecb7fddf089312a46615a2fcd30dff31466: No, it's true, I can make a break for it If I can just get these bracelets off.
textByHashes.68e714e5fbb4af7a3aef0f9dcc82a742338df318: You've obviously never worked as a slave
textByHashes.665dc1e54c111ab9679ecb541ebb3541d2fcefa5: -- The slave nods in agreement and goes back to work. --
textByHashes.b9b4cb0b0e63542c8ea38a821417353b13ccc698: That's funny, I haven't seen you around here before. You're clothes look too clean for you to have been here ages.
textByHashes.9fde9fade6ed33223a928aa96293a1a795303c55: Ah ha! I knew it! A new recruit then? It's a shame that I won't be around long enough to get to know you. I'm making a break for it today.
textByHashes.9d97f17a352cb8d9e2463ffe704f34610b4f5a48: I have a plan to get out of here! It's amazing in its sophistication.
textByHashes.76ef0a2684ba877fc9e5eb9f01f2b38edb4da163: Oh, a special relationship with the guards heh? How very nice of them. Maybe you could persuade them to let me out of here?
textByHashes.9aae13b0f76194c5a6174649d505c4c3b48b7823: Hello again, do you want to try and unlock my chains? I'd really appreciate it!
textByHashes.f9288f4eb9eb611aa07f79acf8d3fa2ed94a5bfe: Okay, if you want to try again, let me know.
textByHashes.cbd5ec46c3d783d2c68ea626a1ce40ed33879dfc: Great! You did it! Do you want to trade clothes now?
textByHashes.ca8232edd4a0edc434142247df26e7f4e79cb5b5: I need a desert robe, a desert shirt and desert boots if you want these clothes off me.
textByHashes.d429393e50367dff43a4a42b14647e2290d1f712: I need a desert robe and a desert shirt if you want these clothes off me.
textByHashes.7959d265f51cff10a8768f4c2395a90cf5742b73: I need a desert robe and desert boots if you want these clothes off me.
textByHashes.f5e69afe526d05ba631997031c1ac08ebe068c4c: I need a desert shirt and desert boots if you want these clothes off me.
textByHashes.7af9f7f3dffcb6bc41c3bf8d4ba7450261d7becf: I need a desert robe if you want these clothes off me.
textByHashes.d21e777f08be857e7f9c01c08ce9619afb1755a6: I need desert boots if you want these clothes off me.
textByHashes.036c51d27567b329a1002c1a0deb1820b3c674ee: I need a desert shirt if you want these clothes off me.
textByHashes.62f7b4c054e99d8e9febc651652e5d3df91adf8a: Great! You have the Desert Clothes! -- The slave starts undressing right in front of you -- Okay, here's the clothes, I won't need them anymore.
textByHashes.95529672a78dd8d0344dd5fa19490d41de8f439c: Okay, fair enough, let me know if you change your mind though.
textByHashes.aceae71bdde08e84a4cf9df16b1dbd98b55ab4fd: Okay, fair enough. Let me know when you want to give it another go.
textByHashes.d263a51b5f4a0a41b8b620d6c4e1294df1aaa8e8: Do you still want to try and undo the locks for me?
textByHashes.976c2bcf33299bcddf80f9d184e55f153f2a9439: Not much to do here but mine all day long.
textByHashes.a7f44062f7491073e7b2cda35171732eecb771d9: Do you have the Desert Clothes yet?
textByHashes.3335b36000445c47058445c93ae35a7316773147: Oh bother, I was caught by the guards again... Listen, if you can get me some Desert Clothes, I'll trade you for my slaves clothes again.. Do you want to trade?
textByHashes.dd7079a971d511f509445dbdf055dd6637cac480: Hey leave me alone, can't you see that I'm busy?
textByHashes.d28952560cb9002ba90a2b478f336118e7e751ba: Work, work, work, that's all I ever do.
textByHashes.f93769913e181991862f5b17a6f3a41c8299f3fb: I feel so weak, I could faint.
textByHashes.dac4e8f6fbe8153475ab68678c898acf154cd89b: I'm so tired, I could sleep standing up.
textByHashes.0f3f2398378d08a3fe923f237c5f01cba0c867e3: What I wouldn't give for a good night's rest.
textByHashes.127e446e60b0887c9522e20929a744ca71cb48ae: I'm rich in experience, poor in wealth.
textByHashes.b5e40663e22f657debdc77369ec875f50f89c6b8: I can't think straight I'm so tired.
textByHashes.3770bcc72cfa81d6df50e3c49e50cc2a533fc9ce: Beware the rowdies, they're spoiling for a fight.
textByHashes.c470048ada4137ab65dc05b91fe9513e63372c16: One day I'm gonna get out of here.
textByHashes.ee04ee0ef43e32d846a654b756d7f1baa74421ec: I need a new pick axe.
textByHashes.68f1a6076edb07d6ac695d18117ac7d026f3ce11: Work, work work, that's all I ever do!
textByHashes.22a77fec7305778722e180f7f45d7a78e4e72fd3: Good luck to ya, you're gonna need it.
